title: Roster
subtitle: Comparative view of {label}'s {count} artists — health, profitability, valuation.

guard.title: Label view only
guard.description: The roster compares every artist on the label side by side. In artist view you only access your own data.

table.title: Roster comparison
table.hint: Clicking a row focuses the whole dashboard on that artist

matrix.title: Growth × margin matrix
matrix.subtitle: Each artist's strategic position — monthly stream growth vs 12-month net margin. Size = 12-month revenue.

alerts.title: Roster alerts
alerts.subtitle: Expiring contracts and negative momentum
alerts.empty: No alerts — the whole roster is in the green
